user_message: Just got this from Sarah Singh at Consolidated Messenger -- I need help figuring out consumption trend. Not urgent but would be good to have by EOD.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Sarah Singh <sarah.singh@consolidated.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-19 16:39 EST
Subject: Re: consumption trend Discussion - Next Steps

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with consumption trend. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Sarah Singh <sarah.singh@consolidated.com>
Date: 2024-02-21 17:52 EST
Subject: Re: consumption trend Discussion - Next Steps

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about consumption trend. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Consolidated Messenger: the cost projections need to factor in reserved instance pricing for accuracy

handoffs.condition: contact and opportunity records need updating

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF38-H trap (Confuses role-change with departure); produces complete Stakeholder map delta, opportunity-at-risk assessment, re-engagement plan, contact update proposals,
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF38-H failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF38-H failure mode (Confuses role-change with departure)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct consumption trend decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF38-H -- Confuses role-change with departure
